title: Dragon Mounts 2
description: A mod that adds fire breathing dragons, new equipments and armor, and adds nest structures all over your world, including The Nether and The End.
body:
![Dragon Mounts 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb34b19fd9a378f3fded1ceac251bc70bc0940f3.png)

**[Minecraft Forum Thread](https://www.minecraftforum.net/forums/mapping-and-modding-java-edition/minecraft-mods/3215641-dragon-mounts-2)**

**[GitHub Page](https://github.com/DragonMounts-Team/DragonMounts2-Expanded) | [Issue Tracker](https://github.com/DragonMounts-Team/DragonMounts2-Expanded/issues)**

Recommended to include the recipe viewer: [Just Enough Items (1.11 to 1.12)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)

## Support Dragon Mounts 2
**Discord:** [https://discord.gg/Ewm8aTTJ3K](https://discord.gg/Ewm8aTTJ3K)

**QQ:** [https://qm.qq.com/q/iGfH75Ldsc](https://qm.qq.com/q/iGfH75Ldsc)  - (Code: 974797002)

## Overview
Dragon Mounts 2 is a mod that adds fire breathing dragons, nests structures, new tools and armor!

It is a different mod compared to it's prequel **[Dragon Mounts](https://modrinth.com/mod/dragon-mounts)**. The premise of this version is to expand the original Dragon Mounts by adding in an rpg adventure-styled experience.

* To hatch a dragon egg, you'll need to find a good place for it first. If you found one, place the egg block and simply right click it. The egg will then start to hatch, which will take a while.
* Once grown up, you can tame the dragon with any meat. It will then follow and protect you like other pets.
* You can command tamed dragons to lay down or stand up with the whistle or in the inventory.
* To ride a tamed dragon, use a saddle on it, then right click it without holding an action item.
* To heal injured dragons, feed it with any raw fish, chicken, beef or porkchop (four hearts) or with rotten flesh (two hearts).
* You can control the dragon with W, A, S and D keys.

For a beta 1.21.4 port, see our GitHub: https://github.com/DragonMounts-Team/NeoDragonMounts

## Cheats

The Dragon Mounts 2 mod offers two cheats, the player can use when cheats are enabled:

* `/dragon state <State>`: This will set the dragon the player is looking at to a different state. "egg", "hatchling", "juvenile" or "adult" can be used on the dragon the player is looking at.

## Ownership of Dragon Mounts 2

After the original development of the mod ended back in 2019, I (Tomanex) and SKoala have revived and own Dragon Mounts 2 with permissions from the original authors that was left uncredited by a different mod developer.

**Dragon Mounts 2** is fully endorsed by the original former authors. Any projects created by unauthorized developers are unofficial works and fake.

**Permissions granted by **[Kingdomall](https://modrinth.com/user/Kingdomall)**, **[Ukan](https://modrinth.com/user/Ukan)** and **[Shannieann](https://modrinth.com/user/Shannieann)** for Dragon Mounts 2.**

![Permission 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/11724e81f0c69277150c41461065295085af7613.png)
![Permission 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e6e6e4be08bdf020f6a733385486660d31ada0f1.png)

## Dependencies
Post 1.12.2 (v1.6.3)

- None

Pre 1.12.2 (v1.6.2)

- Requires LLibrary
## Issues / Bug Reports
If you found something that doesn't look right, is probably a bug, please head over to our [Github](https://github.com/DragonMounts-Team/DragonMounts2-Expanded) to report it! Your bugs are most likely to be seen there versus our **[Discord](https://discord.gg/Ewm8aTTJ3K)** server.
